rules.then: start next session with 2 easier confidence-building items

rules.if: recent_accuracy >= 80 and mastery rising in same skill bucket
rules.then: increase difficulty by one level for next 3-5 items
serve mixed review with 70 percent target skill and 30 percent easier support items

rules.if: conversation activity has not been used in 5 sessions
rules.then: recommend one conversation session as next activity

rules.if: avg_time_per_item is rising while accuracy drops
rules.then: switch to shorter session or easier task type
prioritize short high-value tasks and defer long activities
